mdSummary:
# Marquee

Infinitely scrolling horizontal band of children.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/marquee

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Marquee | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Marquee | Speed | `MarqueeSpeed` | `MarqueeSpeed.Normal` |  |
| Marquee | Direction | `MarqueeDirection` | `MarqueeDirection.Left` |  |
| Marquee | PauseOnHover | `bool` | `` |  |
| Marquee | Reverse | `bool` | `` |  |
| Marquee | Vertical | `bool` | `` |  |
| Marquee | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Marquee | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Marquee) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Marquee />
```

## CSS variables

## Files
- `UI/Marquee/Marquee.razor`
